title: Disney Pixar Toy Story 4 Days of the Week Stick On Earrings and Rings Set
description:
Add some Disney flair to your daily wear with the Toy Story 4 Days of the Week Ring and Earrings Set! Each day of the week has a coordinated Earring and Ring combo, making accessorizing any outfit effortlessly! Rings feature your favorite characters including Woody, Buzz, Bo Peep, Jessie, and more! No ear piercings? No problem! These stick-on earrings are easy to use and make this a perfect gift for young Toy Story fans.

Disney Pixar Toy Story 4 Days of the Week Stick On Earrings and Rings Set

Add some Disney flair to your daily wear with the Toy Story 4 Days of the Week Ring and Earrings Set!

Key Features

  • OFFICIALLY LICENSED: Official Disney/Pixar Toy Story 4 Jewelry Set! | For Ages 3 and Up.
  • STICK-ON EARRINGS: No Ear Piercings? No Problem. | Easy-to-Use Earrings Stick Right On!
  • COORDINATED SETS: 7 Separate Earring and Ring Matching Sets.
  • FUN DESIGNS: Earrings in Fun Designs and Colors, Including: Bows, Planets, Rocket Ships, and Stars!
  • CLASSIC CHARACTERS: Featuring Your Favorite Toy Story 4 Characters! | Ring Designs With: Bo Peep, Woody, Buzz, Jessie, and More.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 14PCWEEKEARRING
  • UPC: 060886804444
  • Color: Multi
  • Size: Small
